FINAL UPDATE: Both northbound I-5 lanes are now OPEN south of Bellingham.

data.body: AI fits. Viscous — embedded in healthcare, finance, warfare, search, art. Nonlocal — there's no place where 'AI' is. Phased — chatbot to a consumer, infrastructure to an engineer, job displacement to a worker, weapon to a soldier. You can't regulate it as a bounded object.
